articles.title: How AI changed your daily work at office?
articles.summary: I would like to know from folks whose companies are using AI (or started recently using AI), in what ways your daily work changed? Did it become easier or challenging, or boring? Has the quality of the work or productivity increased?Personally I have been using AI for my side projects but I haven't seen change in my work life (full stack development). So curious to know others experiences. Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47801978 Points: 1 # Comments: 0

articles.title: Luma launches AI-powered production studio with faith-focused Wonder Project
articles.summary: The studio's first project will be about Moses and star Academy Award-winner Ben Kingsley, to be released this spring on Prime Video.

articles.title: Upscale AI in talks to raise at $2B valuation, says report
articles.summary: AI infrastructure company Upscale AI is reportedly in talks to raise its third funding round since launching just seven months ago.

articles.title: Physical Intelligence, a hot robotics startup, says its new robot brain can figure out tasks it was never taught
articles.summary: The new model, called π0.7, represents what the company describes as an early but meaningful step toward the long-sought goal of a general-purpose robot brain.

articles.title: Google now lets you explore the web side-by-side with AI Mode
articles.summary: Now, when you're using AI Mode on Chrome desktop, clicking a link will open the web page side-by-side with AI Mode.

articles.title: AI traffic to US retailers rose 393% in Q1, and it’s boosting their revenue too
articles.summary: Adobe says AI traffic to U.S. retail sites also jumped 269% in March, with visitors converting better and generating more revenue than non-AI shoppers.

articles.title: Meta raises Quest 3 and Quest 3S prices due to RAM shortage
articles.summary: Starting April 19, the price of the Meta Quest 3S (128GB) and Meta Quest 3S (256GB) will go up by $50 to $349.99 and $449.99, respectively. The price of the Meta Quest 3 is going up by $100 to $599.99.

articles.title: Canva’s AI assistant can now call various tools to make designs for you
articles.summary: The latest version of Canva's AI assistant lets users create editable designs with text prompts.

articles.title: Google’s AI Mode update lets you open links without leaving the page
articles.summary: Google is upgrading AI Mode in Chrome with a new feature that will allow you to open links to sources alongside your chat. Now, instead of automatically opening a new tab, clicking a source will open the website side by side with AI Mode, allowing you to ask follow-up questions about what's on the page. […]

articles.title: Canva’s AI 2.0 update goes all in on prompt-powered design tools

articles.title: Google launches a Gemini AI app on Mac
articles.summary: Google is launching a new Gemini app on Mac that allows you to interact with the AI assistant without switching windows on your desktop. With the app, you can use the Option + Space shortcut to pull up a floating chat bubble, where you can ask Gemini questions and share your window. Before sharing your […]
